name: 18alpha-Glycyrrhetinic Acid Proteasome Activator Decelerates Aging and Alzheimer's Disease Progression in Caenorhabditis elegans and Neuronal Cultures
summary: A compound-mediated proteasome activation study in C. elegans and neuronal cultures, reporting lifespan extension and reduced Alzheimer's disease model phenotypes after 18alpha-glycyrrhetinic acid treatment.
